title: Login Issues
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still receive an 'Invalid Credentials' error message.

title: Payment Failed
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing. The bank confirms funds are available but the gateway rejects it.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive on both Chrome and Safari browsers.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it in profile settings, but the changes are not reflecting on the checkout page.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after the splash screen on Android 13. The user has tried clearing cache and reinstalling without success.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: A refund for Order #8829 was approved two weeks ago but the customer has not received the amount yet. Payment was made via Rocket.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: User is not receiving the 6-digit 2FA code on their registered mobile number. They are stuck at the security verification step.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: The system throws a 'File too large' error even when the user uploads a 500KB JPG image. The limit should be 2MB as per documentation.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer was charged for an annual plan renewal despite turning off the auto-renew toggle last month. Requesting an immediate reversal.

title: Missing Order Email
description: Customer placed an order 3 hours ago but hasn't received a confirmation email. They've checked the spam folder and verified the email address.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: The dashboard is taking more than 10 seconds to load for users in the Chittagong region. Other parts of the site seem to be working fine.

title: Duplicate Payment Charged
description: The customer was charged twice for a single transaction due to a network glitch. Both transactions show up as 'Success' in their bank statement.

title: Dark Mode Feature Request
description: Several users have requested a native dark mode for the dashboard to reduce eye strain during night-time usage. To be added to the backlog.

title: Account Locked Permanently
description: User's account has been locked after three incorrect login attempts. The 'Unlock via Email' link is sending an expired token.

title: Invoice PDF Format Issue
description: The generated invoice PDF is missing the company logo and the tax breakdown table is appearing garbled. This needs urgent fixing for auditing.
